nasb.text: If your valuation is of the male from twenty years even to sixty years old, then your valuation shall be fifty shekels of silver, after the shekel of the sanctuary.

esv.text: then the valuation of a male from twenty years old up to sixty years old shall be fifty shekels of silver, according to the shekel of the sanctuary.

cnv.text: 你應該這樣估價：從二十歲到六十歲的男人，你要按著聖所衡量銀子的標準，估價五百五十克銀子。

ccb.text: 以圣所的秤为准，要为二十至六十岁的男子估价五百五十克银子，
